description_long: This is a modern bungalow set on a spacious lot with a mix of paved and landscaped areas. The main structure is rectangular with a flat roof and large windows, complemented by a small detached outbuilding and a driveway leading to a garage. The property features a front porch, a driveway, and a small garden area with trees and shrubs. The exterior is finished in light gray and white tones, with some darker accents around the windows and doors. The bungalow is surrounded by a low boundary wall and has a paved walkway leading to the entrance. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with an emphasis on open space and natural light.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, a front porch, a garage, and landscaped surroundings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, porch, driveway, and landscaped garden with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and the expanse of the backyard lawn.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bungalow, the outbuilding, and the boundary wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage entrance, side windows, and the transition from paved to landscaped areas.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on the front and sides
